title: gcp_service_account_key
description: One GCP service account key — one record per key. User-managed keys are a hygiene risk; policies check age and encourage system-managed keys.

service_account_id.description: Parent service account email or resource name.

key_type.description: Key management type: USER_MANAGED or SYSTEM_MANAGED.

is_user_managed.description: Key is USER_MANAGED (customer-created, higher rotation risk).
